title: REINDEX causes "UNIQUE constraint failed" error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT PRIMARY KEY, b VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, c FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b, c) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14), (2, 'example', 2.71);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_b ON t1(CONCAT(b, c));
key_bug_features: REINDEX operation triggers UNIQUE constraint violation
